headline: 3 Transport-Service Stocks to Keep an Eye on Despite Industry Hiccups
summary: EXPD, ZTO and ULH are emerging as resilient players in the Zacks Transportation-Services industry, even as the freight downturn and high fuel costs continue to weigh on the industry.
